description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, Mob

This technique allows you to erase your presence from the target's senses and create eight illusory replicas that attack the target from all sides. Make a melee attack against the target. If the subject failed its save, the attack gains a +10 bonus to the attack roll, Kawarimi Defense 3, and the subject loses its Dexterity bonus to Defense against the attack.

If you can use the Shiden technique (p226), you may increase the Chakra Cost by 6 and increase the Perform Requirements by 4 to allow this technique to be used from 30 ft. away, adding the same conditions and effects of Shiden to the attack.

This technique counts as a Rank 12 genjutsu technique for the purpose of identifying it.
